articles.title: MCP just deleted the session: what the July 28 spec breaks in your server
articles.summary: The July 28 MCP rewrite goes stateless. It fixes your load balancer and does nothing for the bill you actually pay: tool-schema context bloat. articles.title: My Anthropic bill dropped from $312 to $156 after I added two bash hooks to Claude Code
articles.summary: 60% of a $312 Anthropic bill came from a single pattern: Claude Code hitting a D1 migration failure, then spinning up 7–8 retry Bash calls trying to diagnose what went wrong. articles.title: Enterprise-Managed Authorization: Zero-touch OAuth for MCP
articles.summary: The Enterprise-Managed Authorization extension to the Model Context Protocol is now stable, enabling organizations to centrally provision MCP server access through their identity provider so users get connected servers on first login without per-app OAuth.
